emails.subject: Marie Heard's Party
emails.body: Marie Heard's Party Tana, please look at that list as soon as you can. I'd like to get the email out today or tomorrow since we need rsvps for the food and drink. Thanks, Suz

emails.subject: Re: Marie Heard's Party
emails.body: Sara told me to put them on the list. I've got a voice mail into her regarding same. On another note, is there anything you need for tomorrow. I sent the email saying the meeting was from 12 to 1:30 in 46C1 and lunch w/be provided. Let me know if there's anything else you need. Tana Jones 05/22/2000 02:57 PM
